title: Ninja StaySharp Knife Set, Stainless Steel 6-Piece Knife Set with Integrated Sharpener, Includes Kitchen and Herb Scissors, Black K62006EUUK
features: 6-PIECE KNIFE SET: Premium Stainless Steel kitchen knife set, plus on-trend Wooden Knife Block
DURABLE STAINLESS STEEL: Built to last - crafted from German X50CrMov15 rust-resistant stainless steel, Ninja knives are rust resistant and strong enough for all your kitchen cutting tasks
FULL TANG DESIGN: Made from a single piece of metal to create a stronger, more durable knife that feels expertly balanced in your hand
BUILT-IN SHARPENER: No guesswork, practice or mess! An integrated stone wheel sharpens knives at the optimum angle, with a few swipes of the lever
10-YEAR GUARANTEE: StaySharp knives deliver 10 years of excellent performance. When used in conjunction with StaySharp Sharpener. Upon registration with Ninja
